headline: CoStar Group Corrects D. E. Shaw’s Highly Misleading Claims
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 11, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics, and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets, today issued the following statement.
